_comment: ADX Bank business rules — single source of truth for all banking constants. Loaded at startup by app/config/bank_rules.py.
_source: ADX Bank internal operations. All values here are enforced by the application code.

otp.resend_policy: A new OTP can be requested by restarting the flow (register / login again). There is no in-place resend button.
otp.description: OTPs are 6-digit numeric codes sent to the registered email address. Each OTP is valid for 5 minutes and allows a maximum of 3 verification attempts. After 3 failed attempts the OTP status is set to FAILED and a new one must be requested by restarting the flow.

auth.two_step_login: Step 1 verifies password; Step 2 verifies a LOGIN OTP sent to email.
auth.description: Login is a two-step process: password verification followed by an email OTP. After 3 consecutive failed password attempts the account is locked for 1 hour. JWT tokens expire after 30 minutes requiring re-login. Password reset links sent via email expire in 15 minutes. Minimum password length is 8 characters.

wallet.process_steps: Step 1 — initiate (enter amount, receive OTP). Step 2 — confirm (enter OTP to credit account).
wallet.description: Add Money uses a secure two-step OTP process. Minimum ₹1, maximum ₹50,000 per transaction. Daily limit ₹1,00,000. Monthly limit ₹5,00,000. Accounts with KYC PENDING are restricted to ₹10,000 per month. Zero transaction fees. The OTP is valid for 5 minutes. The pending top-up session is stored for 5 minutes.

transfer.transfer_scope: Intra-bank only — both sender and receiver must hold ADX Bank accounts.
transfer.availability: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
transfer.description: Transfers are instant and available 24x7. Only intra-ADX-Bank transfers are supported (both accounts must be with ADX Bank). Minimum ₹1, maximum ₹5,00,000 per transaction, ₹10,00,000 per day. Accounts with KYC PENDING cannot send transfers above ₹50,000. Self-transfers (same account) are not allowed. Zero fees. OTP required for every transfer, valid 5 minutes.

loan.emi_formula: EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n − 1)  where P = principal, r = monthly rate (12%/12/100 = 0.01), n = tenure in months
loan.description: Personal loans at 12% p.a. fixed reducing-balance interest. Maximum eligible loan = 12× monthly salary (e.g. ₹10,000 salary → max ₹1,20,000). Tenure 1–24 months. A 1% processing fee is charged on the principal at disbursement. Minimum KYC-verified salary ₹10,000/month and minimum age 21. Loan booking ID valid for 5 minutes; OTP required to confirm. EMI calculated using the standard reducing-balance formula. Account is tagged as Default after 30 days overdue and NPA after 90 days.

account.joining_bonus_trigger: Credited automatically on successful email OTP verification
account.salary_credit_trigger: Declared salary auto-credited ~2 minutes after account activation (demo feature)

account_statuses.inactive: Registered but email not verified; no transactions allowed
account_statuses.dormant: No transactions for 12 consecutive months; contact support to reactivate
account_statuses.blocked: Blocked due to suspicious activity or policy violation; contact support

account.description: Zero minimum balance SAVINGS account in INR. ₹500 joining bonus credited immediately on email verification. Declared salary is auto-credited approximately 2 minutes after activation. Minimum age 18. KYC via Aadhaar and PAN. Account goes dormant after 12 months of inactivity.

security.otp_storage: SHA-256 hash only — plaintext OTP never stored
security.description: Passwords are bcrypt-hashed. OTPs are stored only as SHA-256 hashes — the plaintext OTP is never saved. JWT tokens use HS256 algorithm with a 30-minute expiry. Every sensitive action (login, transfer, add money, loan booking) requires OTP verification. Customer data is retained for 7 years after account closure per regulatory requirements.

fees_and_charges.description: ADX Bank charges ZERO fees for account opening, fund transfers, and add-money transactions. Loans carry a 1% processing fee on the principal, deducted at disbursement. No foreclosure or prepayment penalty is currently levied.

support.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9 AM – 6 PM IST
support.grievance_escalation: If unresolved within 24 hours, reply to the original support email with ESCALATE in the subject line.
support.description: Customer support available via email at support@adxbank.demo, Monday to Saturday 9 AM–6 PM IST. Response guaranteed within 24 business hours. For escalations, reply to the original thread with ESCALATE in the subject.

pagination.description: API results are paginated at 10 items per page by default, with a maximum of 50 per page.

compliance.bank_type: Digital-only demo bank (NOT a real regulated bank)
compliance.disclaimer: ADX Bank is a demo application and NOT a real financial institution. No real money is involved.
compliance.description: ADX Bank is a demo/simulation platform and is not a real regulated bank. All transactions use demo balances. Customer data is retained for 7 years. Re-KYC is required every 2 years for active accounts.
